window.fdi: FROM OCTOBER 2019 TO March 2026 (verbatim table sub-heading, including the inconsistent capitalisation of 'March')

iem_years_excluded.2017: predates the FDI state series (starts Oct-2019)
iem_years_excluded.2018: predates the FDI state series (starts Oct-2019)
iem_years_excluded.2019: DEFECTIVE IN SOURCE -- see IEM_YEARS_IN_WINDOW comment

window.year_basis_mismatch: IEM years are CALENDAR years; FDI is a cumulative window running Oct-2019 to Mar-2026. The two are close but not coterminous and are not directly alignable.
window.iem_latest_is_part_year: 'Up to Dec 2025' is a PART-YEAR column, not a full year, and DPIIT revises prior years between reports.

time_limit_note: DPIIT maintains state-wise FDI only from October 2019; the earlier published series is by RBI regional office and bundles states, so no pre-2019 state series exists and none is constructed here.
interpretation_note: Ratio = share of FDI / share of implemented industrial investment. It detects divergence, not virtue. FDI is credited to the registered office of the receiving company, not the project site, so a high ratio can mean financial-centre bookkeeping rather than absent industry; IEM Part B excludes services and sub-threshold projects, so it under-measures services-led states.

join_reconciliation.merged: IEM's separate Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu rows are summed to match FDI Annexure-C's single merged UT

states.state: Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu

fdi_fy_table.source_title: DPIIT Quarterly Fact Sheet on Fact Sheet on Foreign Direct Investment (FDI) from April 2000 to March 2026 - Section F, page 4 of 10
fdi_fy_table.caveat_verbatim: State wise data is maintained w.e.f. October, 2019. Figures are provisional.

fdi_cumulative_annexure_c.period: FROM OCTOBER 2019 TO March 2026 (verbatim table sub-heading, including the inconsistent capitalisation of 'March')
fdi_cumulative_annexure_c.source_title: DPIIT Quarterly Fact Sheet on FDI (April 2000 to March 2026), Annexure-C 'STATE-WISE FDI EQUITY INFLOW', page 10 of 10

iem_part_b.source_title: DPIIT Annual Reports, Appendix V - state-wise IEM Part B (investment ACTUALLY IMPLEMENTED), Rs crore. Multiple reports stitched; each row carries its own source_report.

iem_part_a.source_title: DPIIT Annual Reports, Appendix III - state-wise IEM Part A (investment INTENTIONS filed), Rs crore. Multiple reports stitched; each row carries its own source_report.

extraction_notes: All figures transcribed exactly as printed. No rounding, no unit conversion, no derivation of one currency from the other.

VERIFICATION: every stitched IEM table was re-summed column-by-column against its own printed Grand Total row. AR2025-26 Appendix V (all 5 columns), AR2025-26 Appendix III (all 5), AR2024-25 Appendix V and III (all 5 each), AR2022-23 Appendix V (all 5) all reconcile EXACTLY. This confirms the PDF text extraction did not mis-align any column.
Annexure-C: 34 printed rows re-summed to the printed Gross-Total exactly in INR; USD differs by 0.01 from per-row rounding.

SPELLING NORMALISATION APPLIED in iem_part_a / iem_part_b: source spellings vary by report year and have been normalised to a single label per state. Orissa (AR2021-22, AR2022-23) -> Odisha (AR2024-25, AR2025-26): normalised to 'Odisha'. Puducherry / Pondicherry (both appear) -> 'Puducherry'. Telengana (AR2021-22, AR2022-23) -> Telangana: normalised to 'Telangana'. Lakshwadeep (AR2025-26 typo) / Lakshadweep -> 'Lakshadweep'. 'Daman &Diu', 'TamilNadu', 'UttarPradesh', 'WestBengal' (AR2025-26 lost spaces) -> spaced forms. Row ORDER is identical across all four annual reports, so normalisation is positional and unambiguous.

Annexure-C of the FDI factsheet is NOT normalised - it is a different universe: it lists 'Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu' as ONE merged UT (Sr.No.23) and includes LADAKH, neither of which appear in the IEM appendices (which still list Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu as two separate rows and have no Ladakh row). Do not join FDI and IEM state lists without handling this.

The IEM appendices have exactly 36 state/UT rows in every report and are missing several UTs entirely (no Ladakh, no Delhi NCT variants, no separate Dadra/Daman merger). The FDI Annexure-C has 34 rows including 'State Not Indicated'.

IEM latest columns are PART-YEAR, not full years: AR2025-26 latest column is 'Up to Dec 2025' (9-12 months of calendar 2025 depending on lag) and AR2024-25's was 'Up to Nov 2024'. Do not treat 'Up to Dec 2025' as a complete calendar-2025 figure.
IEM years are CALENDAR years (2021, 2022...), while FDI years are FINANCIAL years (2023-24...). They are not directly alignable.

DPIIT REVISES prior years between reports. Part B 2018: AR2021-22 prints 1265 IEMs / Rs 314,821 cr; AR2022-23 prints 1005 / Rs 255,783 cr for the same year. Part B 2020 IEM count: AR2021-22 prints 818; AR2022-23 and AR2024-25 both print 848 (investment Rs 233,969 cr unchanged). The values here take the LATEST report that carries each year.

2024 in Part B is taken from AR2025-26 (1165 IEMs / Rs 493,765 cr, full year). AR2024-25's 'Up to Nov 2024' figure (978 / Rs 296,398 cr) is the same year measured 13 months earlier and is retained only in grand_totals_as_printed for comparison.
unavailable: FDI Section F for ALL states by financial year: does not exist. DPIIT publishes only a TOP-10 ranking by FY. The only all-state FDI table is the CUMULATIVE Annexure-C (Oct 2019 - Mar 2026), which carries no year split. A full state x financial-year FDI panel therefore cannot be built from DPIIT publications - it would require stitching successive quarterly factsheets' Annexure-C cumulatives and differencing them, which was NOT done here because the task forbids derivation.
FDI state-wise data before October 2019: does not exist as a state series, per DPIIT's own verbatim note. Not attempted.

IEM Part B 2019, from AR 2021-22: the printed 2019 column in AR 2021-22 Appendix-V is DEFECTIVE - for most states the 'Inv (Rs Cr)' cell simply repeats the 'No Filed' cell (Andhra Pradesh 47/47, Chhattisgarh 70/70, Gujarat 110/110, Maharashtra 171/171, Madhya Pradesh 63/63 etc.), and the printed column total (1229 / 1,796,552) does not equal the sum of the printed cells. Verified against a 200-dpi render of the page, so this is a SOURCE defect, not an extraction artifact. The 2019 values supplied here come from AR 2022-23 instead, whose 2019 column does reconcile to its own total.

IEM Part A for 2017: AR 2021-22's Appendix listing Part A investment intentions for 2017 was not located in that report's appendix set (only Appendix-V Part B and Appendix-IV sector-wise Part A were present in the extracted text). Part A therefore starts at 2018. Not guessed.

IEM number-of-IEMs for Part A rows from AR2022-23 and AR2024-25 is captured, but note the AR2025-26 Part A header labels the count column 'No.Filed' whereas AR2022-23 labels it 'Numbers Filed' - same quantity, different wording.

DPIIT FDI Newsletters: not retrieved. The Quarterly Fact Sheet was the authoritative source located and it already carries the full Annexure-C; no newsletter was found offering a longer state-wise series (state-wise data cannot predate Oct 2019 in any case).
